title: selaginella rupestris var. hansenii
intro: Selaginella rupestris var. hansenii, also known as the Rock Spikemoss or Hansen's spikemoss, is a rare and unique species of the Selaginella genus, a type of spikemoss that grows in rocky areas. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella rupestris var. hansenii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Selaginella rupestris var. hansenii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in some parts of the world.
